description_for_human: EU AI Act compliance platform — register AI use cases, classify risk, document governance, and generate audit-ready evidence.
description_for_model: AI Registry (English) / KI Register (German) is an EU AI Act compliance platform for organisations that deploy AI systems. Use this plugin to: (1) look up information about EU AI Act risk classification (minimal, limited, high-risk, prohibited), (2) understand deployer obligations under Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, (3) check what documentation is required for specific AI use cases, (4) understand governance requirements like human oversight models (HITL/HOTL), review cycles, and audit documentation. The platform stores AI use case inventories, risk assessments, governance settings, and AI policies. It is used by organisations in healthcare, HR/recruitment, finance, education, public sector, legal, and manufacturing. Key concepts: use case registration, risk classification, Annex III high-risk categories, human-in-the-loop oversight, policy generation, trust portal, audit export. For complete documentation see https://airegist.com/llms-full.txt.
